meanings.definition: the act of engaging in close hand-to-hand combat
examples: we watched his grappling and wrestling with the bully

meanings.definition: the sport of hand-to-hand struggle between unarmed contestants who try to throw each other down

examples: We got by on just a gallon of gas
They made do on half a loaf of bread every day

meanings.definition: to grip or seize, as in a wrestling match
examples: the two men grappled with each other for several minutes
